title: Sanji Returns to Luffy
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Brûlée, Jinbe, Nami, Brook, Reiju, Sanji as Sanji chooses to return to Luffy, and the assassination plot against Big Mom begins taking shape.
scene: Sanji and Luffy reunite emotionally, turning the rescue mission into a direct conspiracy against Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A quiet rain falls on the two...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Sweet city outskirts

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Jinbe showed up?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yeah! I was totally surprised too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So Nami's Safe, then? I'm so relieved...!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But anyway, now we've just gotta think about how we can meet up with everyone.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They'll all be stoked once they hear you're coming back!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Shishi- shi!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I... can't possibly look nami in the eye, after everything I've done...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nami and Co. Were more worried than anyone, after all!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...and in spite of that, I caused them all terrible grief...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The rain's letting up!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: There they are!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You think they'll be able to hear us...?!

dialogue.speaker: Brûlée
dialogue.text: Even through these tiny mirror fragments?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The last "mirror" we used to talk with you was...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Broken while I was on top of this giant tree monster who called himself "King Baun", so...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hello?! Chopper?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There has to be a least a couple of pieces laying around that area...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Heeeeeeey! Luffyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Sweet city outskirts

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Heee- Eeeey!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hmm?!

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: Luffyyyyyyy! are you thereee?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: That's chopper's voice!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Heee- Eeeey!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Found it! It's coming from this little piece of mirror!

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: Luffyyy! Can you hear Meeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why's there a voice coming from the mirror?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's a long story, but all you need to know is that chopper's inside the mirror with everyone else!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Chopper! Are you guys all right?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ahhhh! Luffy! You're really there! I'm so glad!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Luffy! Do you have Sanji with you?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Yep, he's right here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What about you?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We were able to find and rescue everyone from inside the mirrors, Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And what's more, brook was actually able to get his hands on a copy of the poneglyph!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Whoa, really?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You guys really are the best!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: e... even if you praise me... it won't make me happy or anything, you bastard!')

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Ehehehe, you bas- TARD!()

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: YOHOHO YOU DUNDER- HEAD!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Luffy! It's great that Sanji's with you,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But were you able to reach an under- standing?!

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: SANJI'S NOT COMING BACK JUST YET!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: HuuU- Uuu-H?!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Sanji Returns storyline with 46 dialogue beats. Sanji chooses to return to Luffy, and the crew joins Bege’s risky plan to attack Big Mom during the tea party.
